linkedin.notes: Write a first-person or close third-person summary that integrates credentials into the narrative. Skimmable, but no bullet points.

speaker_introduction.notes: Write for an MC to read aloud. Flow matters; avoid dense jargon. Integrate role, credibility, and what the audience will get.

website_about.notes: Narrative, personable, and specific. Explain the work and the why. Use the same voice as the samples.

press_kit.notes: Third-person bio for media. Include pronunciation if relevant, notable roles, awards, and publication highlights in narrative form.

conference_program.notes: Concise, results-oriented, and tailored to program booklets. Focus on why attendees should pick this session.

global_guidance: Integrate credentials into the story rather than listing them. Match the tone of the voice samples. No bullet lists in any version. Avoid name-first openings where specified and provide multiple opening sentence options with explanations.
